G & M Plumbing won't just tell you how we'll fix your plumbing problem. We'll work with you to create a solution that meets your specific needs. You won't have to worry about your pipes bursting or clogging in your Pflugerville area home once we've finished your job. Reviews.summary: Excellent service, on time, fast, reliable. Would recommend to anyone.
paragraphs: Excellent service, on time, fast, reliable. Would recommend to anyone.

I initially had them replace my cast iron sewage lines on home purchase more than a decade ago and have used them throughout the years. They were extremely fair and helpful during a water heater update when all the other plumbing companies seemed more interested in charging me to see first and also subscription services.Would definitely use again and recommend.

I contacted G&M plumbing to get hydrostatic leak test done after some foundation repair work done at my house. Sonny was very helpful and he sent his brother Eric this morning to complete the work. Very pleasant and wonderful young man and he completed the work in a professional manner. Have no hesitation to recommend G&M for plumbing needs and intend to use them in the future as well.

G & M have been my favorite plumbers since I started working with them in 2021. They are my "go to" team for big projects such as re-plumbing my house to small clogged drains. They are very responsive, have straight forward pricing, and make complex issues easy to understand.

I recently started using G & M Plumbing after they repaired the main line before I purchased my home, and I couldn't be more thrilled with the decision. Gus (a master plumber) and his son Eric have been outstanding from the very beginning. Their attention to detail, expertise, and professionalism are evident in every interaction.Even though they are a new service provider for me, their work speaks for itself. They are quick to respond, incredibly knowledgeable, and fair. It's clear that this family-run business takes pride in delivering high-quality results.I'm beyond satisfied with their service and follow-through, and I'll definitely be calling G & M for any future plumbing needs. If you're looking for reliable and skilled plumbers, I highly recommend G & M Plumbing!
G & M was excellent! They were quick, knowledgeable, and affordable. They will definitely be my first call for any plumbing needs in the future.

This is a long overdue review because I've been going with G&M for over a decade now. Both Gus, a master plumber, & Eric, his son, have come out to work for us many times - both at our residence & our business.This is a family-run business & their rates are very reasonable.The quality of work is also very good, needless to say (given that I'm still using them after a decade).
Always great. Used them for both large and small jobs. Great prices, good service. Eric knows his stuff.
